description: S-sized bug fix: off-by-one in pagination causes last item to be dropped

expected_tdd_phases.red: Write test with boundary input (last page, exact multiple of pageSize) that exposes the off-by-one
expected_tdd_phases.green: Fix end calculation from start+pageSize-1 to start+pageSize

expected_killer_hypothesis: last item in a page is dropped when items length is exact multiple of pageSize
